title: Create: Mass Munitions
description: A mod that adds mass production compatibility between Create and every other gun mod. Yes, every one
body:
![Create: Mass Munitions banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b4f58071d0f86ec1fcd59dd56c550bbcb182f9d.png)

## Create: Mass Munitions

## STILL IN ALPHA
**Things are very broken currently. Most recipes are missing, many textures are missing. This release is merely intended to showcase the systems this project will build on and to recieve feedback on.**

Mass Munitions is a addon made to bring compatability between the Create mod and Timeless & Classics Zero/Vic's Point Blank, in addition to Scorched Guns 2, Guns Craft: Adventurers Arsenal, and every other gun mod with 3d models. Recipes and features will enable or disable themselves depending on which mods you have currently installed. Casings will now drop when guns are fired, and can be recycled back into new cartridges.

My goal is that with this one mod, you can mass produce any gun mod ammunition in a balanced, semi-realistic and fun way.

**Currently only supporting tacz. Once I finish up the work for tacz, I'll be moving on to vpb and then Scorched.** This is project is partially community driven, so join my discord to help out and speed up release times! If you do, you can also make it on the credits list below! :D

**Credits:**

Major Contributors:

MarbledNull - Set up code workspace for this project and continues to advise me on coding issues, in addition to making our various logos.  Couldn't have done it without you, my friend.

Corrineduck/Leducklet - Singlehandly wrote the main code for the casing drops. This mod wouldn't be half as unique and special without you.

Other Contributors:

unwillingsurvivor/muted - A discord member whose suggestion for longer casing pickup delays made it into the mod. Thanks, it's made this mod just that much better

**Join my discord via the link in the side of this page to learn more or ask questions about anything you see here.**
